'''竏營h-n-v-g''' ('''kazhanvegoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:machinate|machinate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-v-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:machinate|machinate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏營h-n-v-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazhanvegoko
|}
